And yeah, I mean, no, no pressure.
Like we're not demand constrained right now.
And we are definitely trying to be intentional about like which partners we choose.
So really just want to make sure like there's a mutual fit here and hopefully.
Why are you being intentional about that?
Or like who?
Like what, what, what is a partner that you choose?
What, what meets that criteria for you?
Yeah, great question.
I would say, you know, invested in content.
See content is like a long-term compounding asset.
Have a point of view on like who the audience they're going after is, what those topics are that they want to focus on.
And are not going to be like a bottleneck for like reviewing and staging and publishing the content.
Those are some of the big ones I would say.
And you don't see us as potentially being a problem with bottlenecking in the content.
Thank Thank

I think, uh, we probably need to make sure that if you all feel good about us as a partner, so does your CEO in terms of like our approach, um, that seems like the only potential red flag in terms of being able to like get approval to publish and publish at like the rate we want to, to deliver results as quickly as we could.
Yeah.
But I think it's probably, you know, an Ashley, an Ashley, an Ashley convo if the next meeting goes really well.
Yeah, exactly.
All right.
Awesome.
you.
Yeah.
Thanks for the time team.
Good to meet everybody.
And, uh, hopefully some of this helps.
Thank you.
Thanks.
Bye.
Yeah.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Hex for AI-powered content creation and SEO/GEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, SEO/GEO strategy, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Hex seeks to scale high-quality content production while maintaining their unique voice and technical depth](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves deep persona research, AI workflows, and expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Next step: Meeting with GrowthX CEO Marcel to address Hex's concerns and explore potential fit](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end SEO/GEO strategy and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint followed by 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows with human experts for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Personalized content creation using client-specific artifacts and knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Rigorous fact-checking and source attribution process](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)

### Hex's Content Challenges

  - [Struggling to scale content production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [CEO has high standards for content authenticity and technical depth](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Need for "uniquely Hex" voice that sounds like "your best friend in the industry"](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Focus on creating content for the data team, both technical and non-technical](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Deep research using various AI tools (Perplexity, EXA, Tavli)](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Creation of detailed persona artifacts and knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [AI-powered brief generation and article creation](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Fact-checking and expert review steps](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Potential for creating a "Barry-proof" acceptance process (Hex CEO)](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

### SEO vs. AEO/GEO Approach

  - [AEO/GEO focus on comprehensive content answering nuanced questions](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Volume of content and audience-first approach](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Use of Scrunch for tracking prompts and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Emphasis on credible, comprehensive, and fresh content](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

### Potential Partnership Benefits

  - [Scaling content production while maintaining Hex's voice](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [Closing the organic traffic gap with competitors (e.g., Sigma)](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Reducing reliance on paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Capitalizing on Hex's product differentiation in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=1993.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with GrowthX CEO Marcel for Wednesday at 12 PM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
  - [GrowthX to send over analysis of Hex's competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=2279.0)
  - [Hex team to discuss internally and prepare questions for Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)
  - [Address potential bottleneck concerns with Hex CEO's content approval process](https://fathom.video/share/yHeBfTZQqba-h9_ExsCfcmHjKkJRGNw1?tab=summary&timestamp=2337.0)

Hold 12pm slot on Marcel's calendar for next Wed meeting w/ Hex team
Send analysis of Hex & competitors to Hex team
